title: LounGenie — Smart Cabana System | Increase Poolside Revenue
excerpt: Turn cabanas into profit centers with LounGenie: waterproof safes, solar USB charging, removable ice buckets, and QR/service ordering.
content:
Turn Every Cabana Into A Revenue Engine — $0 Upfront

Keep guests on the deck longer with waterproof safes, solar USB charging, removable ice buckets, and quick ordering. Zero upfront cost — revenue-share model.

See Features Get Your Free Revenue Projection

4 Ways LounGenie Elevates The Guest Experience

  • ORDER — QR ordering or service call button (prints to PoolSafe printer; no POS integration).
  • STASH — Waterproof safe with keypad for valuables, increasing guest confidence and dwell time.
  • CHARGE — Solar-powered USB charging at the seat so guests stay on deck.
  • CHILL — Removable ice bucket keeps drinks cold and increases repeat orders.

We Install It. We Maintain It. You Keep The Revenue.

Assessment → Install → Earn. Zero capital outlay, maintenance included, measurable F&B lifts from Day 1.

Get Your Free Revenue Projection
